goalbuddy_receipt_v1.rationale: The exact role-and-accessible-name locator is correct. The implicit label includes descendant option text, while the accessibility tree exposes one combobox named Location and a separate Shelf or sub-location textbox.

worker_package.objective: Replace only the line-116 Location label locator with an exact Location combobox role/name locator, then complete all independent browser and persistence gates.
verify: Replace only getByLabel Location exact:true with getByRole combobox name Location exact:true; preserve selectOption and everything else.
Run scoped format/lint and one-file mirror hash equality.
Run fresh management workflow with all actions, three axe/overflow/screenshots, and no browser errors.
Release port, fresh prepare, run integrated workflow with 400/350/50, provenance/manual/intake/FEFO/history, two axe, five screenshots, no browser errors.
Inspect persistence read-only, run disposable migrate/db check, release port, and record diff/status integrity.
stop_if: Pre-hash differs or any other locator/product/fixture/assertion/timeout/file change is required.
Exact role/name semantics weaken or fail.
Workflows share state/database/server or either fails twice.

evidence: T044 timed out only at exact getByLabel.
